entries.title: JSON is the machine source of truth
entries.content: All project control documents consumed by Nightshift are JSON. Human-readable documentation is generated from JSON and is not authoritative.

entries.title: Two knowledge scopes
entries.content: Reusable framework knowledge belongs to the Nightshift repository. Project-specific knowledge belongs to the target repository under .nightshift.

entries.title: Simplicity first
entries.content: Prefer small composable changes, readable code, and concrete needs over speculative abstractions.
